emails.subject: Calgary operations hot list
emails.body: Calgary operations hot list The following are the main items being worked on in Calgary: Operational risk assessment Risk book conversion Retail operations Toronto support IT Development staffing, identification prioritization of office requirements Unify testing I will check with Laura Scott on the A/R question and let you know. Peg

emails.body: Re: Calgary operations hot list Thanks for your list. I will add these to our Hot List. Let me know about the A/R. Thanks. Would love to hear about your trip in more detail. --Sally Peggy Hedstrom 03/26/2001 01:54 PM
